title: Senior Backend Engineer - TypeScript
score_reasoning: Your senior-level distributed systems expertise and payment platform experience (€2M/month billing engine) align well with commercetools' payment systems focus. The Berlin hybrid setup is ideal—your preferred work location with 3 days/week on-site matches your hybrid-acceptable-in-Berlin preference. However, the role's primary requirement is TypeScript backend production experience, and your core stack is Python/Go. While your distributed systems fundamentals are strong, the language gap is meaningful. This role is a conditional fit: strong on seniority, location, and growth trajectory, but the TypeScript requirement is a core blocker unless framed as an upskilling opportunity you're willing to pursue.

red_flags: TypeScript is the primary required language; your production backend is Python/Go, not Node.js
MongoDB (document databases) required—no NoSQL production experience in profile
Payment processor integrations (Adyen, Stripe, etc.) not part of your background
MACH architecture and OAuth/SAML expertise are nice-to-haves but represent growth gaps
Language gap prevents immediate productivity on the core tech stack
